title: First Person View
description: Just a little mod that adding a first person view
body:
**Just a little mod for adding 3d model in first view**

This lightweight modification adds immersive first-person body visibility to your game. See your character's 3D model, including body parts and equipment, directly in first-person perspective.

## Features:
- Press **F6** to toggle the mod on/off instantly
- Customizable visibility settings in the mod configuration
- Control which body parts are shown (torso, arms, legs, head)
- Toggle cape visibility independently
- Compatible with most other mods
